creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please make sure that the following meets:

1. The port needs devel/binutils to build. Is binutils properly installed?
2. Do you have COMPILE_PATH set? It should not be set.
3. You might try selecting GCC 4.4 flag as well - but it works on all of
my test systems without GCC 4.4
4.
===> Configuring for x264-0.0.20100222
[[: not found
[[: not found

- maybe something with your environment? we should try to find out if I
have to fix the port or you have something set I didn't consider
